devnotes.summary: This unit defines the TGrowthCurvePlantRoots class, which extends its parent class to model the growth of plant roots. It evaluates parameters such as root depth, root length and the associated growth rates. The unit also calculates root length density and effective root length and provides several models for the development of root depth. Optional features include root ageing and different choices for depth growth.
devnotes.remarks: TGrowthCurvePlantRoots inherits from TGrowthCurvePlant and provides specific implementations for root growth dynamics. It exposes properties for root depth, root length and growth parameters, as well as methods for initialising and calculating growth rates based on the current state of the plant and the prevailing environmental conditions.

devnotes.summary: TGrowthCurvePlantRoots extends TGrowthCurvePlant to model root growth dynamics.
THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

devnotes.summary: Active duration of root growth.
Array of root length densities [cm.cm-3].
Array of root lengths [cm.cm-2].
Array of effective root length densities [cm.cm-3].
Array of effective root lengths [cm.cm-2].
Number of potential rooted soil layers.
Soil depth for each root component [cm].
Root depth at planting or sowing [cm].
Maximum rooting depth [cm].
Root length at planting or sowing [cm].
Maximum root length [cm].
Growth-rate parameter for root depth development [cm.d-1.°C].
Growth-rate parameter for root depth in an exponential phase [cm.d-1.°C].
Growth-rate parameter for root length development [cm.d-1.°C].
Parameter for the vertical distribution of root length; ratio of RLD at z=0 to RLD at z=zr [-].
Base temperature for root growth.
Sum of root length [cm.cm-2].
Sum of effective root length [cm.cm-2].
State variable for root depth [cm].
Option to enable root growth.
Option for the root depth growth model.
Option for root ageing.
